title: Migration without explicit write concern — data safety risk on failover
expected_feedback: Critical: Migration uses _id-range batching (good), but no write concern is specified. If the cluster default is w:1 and the primary fails during migration, acknowledged writes that haven't replicated to secondaries are lost — leaving the migration in an inconsistent partial state. Specify writeConcern: {w: 'majority'} explicitly for each batch, or document why w:1 is acceptable (re-runnable idempotent migration).
violated_rule: Write concern explicitly set for migration
